summary: Date Range Picker feature for Revenue Tracking fully tested. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The feature allows users to select specific date ranges before downloading revenue reports.
critical_code_review_comments: DateRangePicker component properly uses shadcn Calendar with mode='range' and Popover
All preset buttons (7d, 30d, 90d, 1y) work correctly and close popover after selection
Clear X button on trigger works - resets date range to undefined
Clear button inside popover works - resets and closes popover
Backend /transactions endpoint properly filters by date_from and date_to query params
Backend /export endpoint properly filters CSV by date_from and date_to query params
Date filter uses ISO date string comparison with $gte and $lte operators
Frontend sends date params in yyyy-MM-dd format using date-fns format()
Transactions tab data reloads automatically when date range changes (useCallback dependency)
Export CSV button correctly includes date_from and date_to params from state
Both DateRangePicker instances (header and filter row) share the same dateRange state
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded revenue data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Date Range Picker feature fully tested. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Auth returns 'access_token'. DateRangePicker uses data-testid='date-range-picker-trigger' for trigger button, data-testid='date-preset-7d/30d/90d/1y' for presets, data-testid='date-range-clear-btn' for X button on trigger, data-testid='date-range-clear-all' for Clear button inside popover. Backend endpoints: GET /api/revenue/transactions and GET /api/revenue/export both support date_from and date_to query params.

backend_apis.GET /api/revenue/export (no date filter): PASS - Returns all transactions as CSV

frontend_ui.DateRangePicker in header: PASS - data-testid='date-range-picker-trigger' visible next to Export CSV
frontend_ui.DateRangePicker in Transactions filter r: PASS - Second picker visible in filter row
frontend_ui.Dual-month calendar popover: PASS - Shows 2 months side by side (April 2026, May 2026)
frontend_ui.Preset button 7d: PASS - Sets 7-day range and closes popover
frontend_ui.Preset button 30d: PASS - Sets 30-day range and closes popover
frontend_ui.Preset button 90d: PASS - Sets 90-day range and closes popover
frontend_ui.Transactions data reload: PASS - Count changed from 278 to 27 with 30d filter
frontend_ui.Export CSV with date range: PASS - Export button available with filter active
frontend_ui.Both pickers synced: PASS - Header and filter row show same date range

mocked_data_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All endpoints connected to real MongoDB data
